name: binutils-mingw-w64
title: binutils-mingw-w64
summary: Cross-binutils for Win32 and Win64 using MinGW-w64
description:
Cross-binutils for Win32 and Win64 using MinGW-w64
MinGW-w64 provides a development and runtime environment for 32- and
64-bit (x86 and x64) Windows applications using the Windows API and
the GNU Compiler Collection (gcc).
.
This metapackage provides the toolchain binutils for common targets.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use binutils-mingw-w64 because Cross-binutils for Win32 and Win64 using MinGW-w64.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use binutils-mingw-w64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair binutils-mingw-w64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `binutils-mingw-w64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
